case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC VS. OSCAR ARTURO AGUILERA COELLO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-17-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT OSCAR ARTURO AGUILERA COELLO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARA SANDBERG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE PER CURRENT RESIDENT, RESPONDENT NO LONGER LIVES AT ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILERA COELLO, OSCAR ARTURO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT OSCAR ARTURO AGUILERA COELLO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS A DISMISSAL AS THE MATTER HAS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
